text:
NUM 
LENGTH: 
15 
FILE(S): 
All APR files 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string (e.g., 123456789) 
COMMENT: 
The CCW_APR_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code 
(SUBMTG_STATE_CD) and state-specific provider identifier (SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID). This is the 
unique key for linking all records in the APR base file to the APR supplemental files. There can be more 
than one record in the APR supplemental files for each CCW_APR_LINK_KEY.
